meta.title: High level transient expression of the murine coronavirus haemagglutinin-esterase -- Pfleiderer et al. 72 (6): 1309 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: We have expressed the murine coronavirus haemagglutinin-esterase protein in a vaccinia virus/T7 RNA polymerase system. The levels of expression observed are significantly higher than those found in virus- infected cells. The expressed protein has both receptor-destroying (esterase) and receptor-binding (haemadsorption) activities. The use of this system will greatly facilitate analysis of the structure-function relationships of this protein.
